data_analyst.title: Sales Data Analysis Dashboard
data_analyst.description: Build an interactive dashboard analyzing sales data using Excel, Python, or Power BI. Learn data cleaning, visualization, and insight generation.

data_analyst.title: Customer Segmentation Analysis
data_analyst.description: Segment customers based on purchasing behavior using Python and pandas. Practice clustering, data analysis, and business insights.

data_analyst.title: Financial Data Visualization
data_analyst.description: Create visualizations for financial data using Tableau or Power BI. Learn to present complex data clearly.

soc_analyst.title: Network Traffic Analysis Lab
soc_analyst.description: Set up a home lab to analyze network traffic using Wireshark. Learn packet analysis, protocol understanding, and threat detection.

soc_analyst.title: SIEM Log Analysis Project
soc_analyst.description: Practice analyzing security logs using Splunk or ELK stack. Learn to identify security incidents and create alerts.

soc_analyst.title: Malware Analysis Sandbox
soc_analyst.description: Build a safe environment to analyze malware samples. Learn reverse engineering basics and threat intelligence.

software_developer.title: Todo List Web Application
software_developer.description: Build a full-stack todo list app with React frontend and Node.js backend. Learn CRUD operations, REST APIs, and database integration.

software_developer.title: Weather Dashboard App
software_developer.description: Create a weather dashboard that fetches data from APIs and displays forecasts. Practice API integration and responsive design.

software_developer.title: E-commerce Product Catalog
software_developer.description: Build a product catalog with search, filters, and shopping cart. Learn state management, routing, and user authentication.

cloud_engineer.title: AWS Static Website Hosting
cloud_engineer.description: Deploy a static website using AWS S3, CloudFront, and Route 53. Learn cloud storage, CDN, and DNS configuration.

cloud_engineer.title: Serverless API with Lambda
cloud_engineer.description: Build a serverless REST API using AWS Lambda, API Gateway, and DynamoDB. Learn serverless architecture and event-driven design.

cloud_engineer.title: Infrastructure as Code with Terraform
cloud_engineer.description: Provision cloud infrastructure using Terraform. Learn IaC principles, version control for infrastructure, and automation.

it_help_desk.title: Ticketing System Setup
it_help_desk.description: Set up and configure an open-source ticketing system like osTicket. Learn ticket management, SLA configuration, and user support workflows.

it_help_desk.title: Windows Troubleshooting Lab
it_help_desk.description: Create a virtual lab to practice Windows troubleshooting. Learn common issues, diagnostic tools, and resolution procedures.

it_help_desk.title: Network Printer Configuration
it_help_desk.description: Set up and troubleshoot network printers in a home lab. Learn printer drivers, network protocols, and common printing issues.

web_developer.title: Personal Portfolio Website
web_developer.description: Build a responsive portfolio website showcasing your projects. Learn HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and responsive design principles.

web_developer.title: Blog Platform with CMS
web_developer.description: Create a blog platform with content management system. Learn database design, user authentication, and CRUD operations.

web_developer.title: Real-time Chat Application
web_developer.description: Build a real-time chat app using WebSockets. Learn real-time communication, event handling, and user presence.

cybersecurity.title: Vulnerable Web App Pentesting
cybersecurity.description: Practice penetration testing on intentionally vulnerable web applications like DVWA or WebGoat. Learn common vulnerabilities and exploitation techniques.

cybersecurity.title: Security Audit Automation
cybersecurity.description: Create scripts to automate security audits and vulnerability scanning. Learn Python, security tools, and automation.

cybersecurity.title: Incident Response Playbook
cybersecurity.description: Develop an incident response playbook for common security incidents. Learn IR procedures, documentation, and best practices.

ai_ml_engineer.title: Image Classification with CNN
ai_ml_engineer.description: Build a convolutional neural network to classify images. Learn deep learning, TensorFlow/PyTorch, and model training.

ai_ml_engineer.title: Sentiment Analysis NLP Project
ai_ml_engineer.description: Create a sentiment analysis model for text data. Learn natural language processing, text preprocessing, and model evaluation.

ai_ml_engineer.title: Recommendation System
ai_ml_engineer.description: Build a recommendation system using collaborative filtering. Learn recommendation algorithms, data processing, and evaluation metrics.

general.title: GitHub Profile README
general.description: Create an impressive GitHub profile README to showcase your skills and projects. Learn Markdown and personal branding.

general.title: Command Line Tool
general.description: Build a useful command-line tool in your preferred language. Learn CLI development, argument parsing, and user interaction.

general.title: API Integration Project
general.description: Integrate with public APIs to build a useful application. Learn API authentication, data fetching, and error handling.
